recommendations.title: The Secret Life of Words
recommendations.overview: A solitary nurse bonds with a badly burned patient who survived an accident on an oil rig.

recommendations.title: The Bookshop
recommendations.overview: Set in a small English town in 1959, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

recommendations.title: Elegy
recommendations.overview: Cultural critic David Kepesh finds his life -- which he indicates is a state of "emancipated manhood" -- thrown into tragic disarray by Consuela Castillo, a well-mannered student who awakens a sense of sexual possessiveness in her teacher.

recommendations.title: Another Me
recommendations.overview: A teenager finds her perfect life upended when she's stalked by a mysterious doppelganger who has her eyes set on assuming her identity.

recommendations.title: Learning to Drive
recommendations.overview: As her marriage dissolves, a Manhattan writer takes driving lessons from a Sikh instructor with marriage troubles of his own. In each other's company they find the courage to get back on the road and the strength to take the wheel.

recommendations.title: Elisa & Marcela
recommendations.overview: The film tells the true story of Elisa Sánchez Loriga and Marcela Gracia Ibeas, two women in 1901 Spain who fell deeply in love. To overcome societal and legal barriers to their relationship, Elisa assumes a male identity, enabling the pair to marry

recommendations.title: Drawing Closer
recommendations.overview: With only a year left to live, 17-year-old Akito finds new meaning in life by bringing joy to a terminally ill girl who has just six months remaining.

recommendations.title: Now Is Good
recommendations.overview: A girl dying of leukemia compiles a list of things she'd like to do before passing away. Topping the list is her desire to lose her virginity.

recommendations.title: Stories We Tell
recommendations.overview: Canadian actress and filmmaker Sarah Polley investigates certain secrets related to her mother, interviewing a group of family members and friends whose reliability varies depending of their implication in the events, which are remembered in differen

recommendations.title: Women Talking
recommendations.overview: A group of women in an isolated religious colony struggle to reconcile their faith with a series of sexual assaults committed by the colony's men.
